findings.title: Integer overflow in room charge calculation
findings.description: Multiplication of int32 RoomRate by int32 Nights can exceed int32 max and wrap silently

findings.title: Integer overflow in tax computation
findings.description: Intermediate multiplication of large room charge by tax basis points overflows int32

findings.title: Integer overflow in total computation with addition
findings.description: Addition of large charge and tax values overflows int32 when both are near maximum

findings.title: Integer overflow in seasonal rate calculation
findings.description: Multiplication of int32 baseRate by int32 SeasonFactor overflows for large rates

findings.title: Integer overflow in room block allocation
findings.description: int32 multiplication of rooms by dataPerRoom can wrap to small positive value bypassing negative check

findings.title: Integer overflow in loyalty points calculation
findings.description: Multiplication of int32 spendCents by int32 multiplier overflows for high-spending customers

findings.title: Truncation in currency conversion result
findings.description: 64-bit intermediate result truncated to int32 on return, losing data for large conversions
